## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] `mypy quanted_agents` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (under `## [Unreleased]` if it exists, otherwise add the section)
- [ ] Updated documentation in `docs/` if the public API changed
